textByHash.fef91d629cc58fdba5e77ffbd2dc895d3ae0fdef: Ohh, I know you. You're the one that helped father take the throne! Of course, now it's my brothers throne instead.
textByHash.ee06acfb9b7a096a0ad56166dea9790a4a6ffdb6: Boring! Things were much more fun when my only job was to taste the wine and get drunk.
textByHash.50b941ad56b16e2b7b6d3a7579f0b8f7f5eeae25: Yes, but now I have to do other things as well.
textByHash.8e4aad717babc62d53c5874819de12191685ac5a: It is. Now, if you'll excuse me, I'm going to have another drink.
